evidence: Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold (3151 decls) is exactly the formal home of manifold theory: charts, smooth structures, tangent bundles, manifolds with boundary/corners.
Mathlib/Condensed (465 decls) is exactly Clausen-Scholze condensed mathematics: condensed sets/modules, sheaves on profinite sets.
Configuration.lean (47 decls) formalizes abstract point-line incidence configurations (projective-plane-style axioms), the core finite-geometry object in Mathlib.

Q10843274 'analytic number theory' (Wikidata class Q1936384, field of study) is the DISCIPLINE, not the object riemannZeta -- field/object conflation. Mathlib/NumberTheory/LSeries/ is a dedicated folder (RiemannZeta.lean, Dirichlet.lean, HurwitzZeta*.lean, Nonvanishing.lean, PrimesInAP.lean, AbstractFuncEq.lean, etc.) that is the natural home for analytic-number-theory content in mathlib -- a better field-level home than pinning to the single riemannZeta decl.
Grothendieck topos theory (sheaves on sites) is formalized in CategoryTheory/Sites, complementing the elementary-topos folder.
Dedicated Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Topos folder formalizes elementary topos structure (subobject classifier etc.), the standard formal home for topos theory.
Mathlib/Combinatorics/Matroid (1365 decls) is the dedicated matroid-theory folder (independence, rank, duality, minors).
Module theory's core algebraic definitions (modules, submodules, linear maps) live in Mathlib/Algebra/Module; broader module-theoretic results extend into LinearAlgebra.
Dedicated Mathlib folder for multilinear maps/forms (273 decls), the standard formal home for the field.
C*-algebras and operator algebra theory (1326 decls) is a core operator-theory subfield formalized here.
Mathlib/RingTheory (17722 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder for ideals, localization, Noetherian/Artinian rings, valuation theory etc — the field's formal home.
Smooth manifold foundations (3151 decls) is the closest Mathlib container to differential topology, though Morse/transversality theory itself is thin.
Mathlib/Topology/MetricSpace (2580 decls): metric geometry (Gromov-Hausdorff, geodesics) is a subset of this folder, no dedicated subfolder exists yet.
Dedicated Mathlib folder matching the field name exactly (rational approximation of reals, continued fractions).
Mathlib/NumberTheory (6306 decls) is the canonical dedicated top-level folder for number theory: primes, Diophantine, L-series, cyclotomic fields, etc.
Mathlib/SetTheory (4562 decls) is the dedicated set-theory folder: cardinals, ordinals, ZFC, surreal numbers.
Mathlib/Combinatorics/SimpleGraph (3274 decls) is the large, well-developed dedicated graph-theory folder (connectivity, coloring, matchings, walks).
Dynamical-systems fixed-point results (periodic points etc.) live in Mathlib/Dynamics/FixedPoints, another core branch of fixed point theory.
Order-theoretic fixed-point theorems (Knaster-Tarski etc.) are in Mathlib/Order/FixedPoints, one of the field's classical branches.
Mathlib/RepresentationTheory (1951 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder for group/algebra representations, characters, FDRep, Maschke's theorem etc.

'Fourier analysis' (Q1365258) is the field of mathematics; Mathlib/Analysis/Fourier/ is a dedicated folder (FourierTransform.lean, ZMod.lean, PoissonSummation.lean, Convolution.lean, Inversion.lean, RiemannLebesgueLemma.lean, etc.) that is exactly this field's home in mathlib — VectorFourier.fourierIntegral is one specific decl within it, not the field as a whole
Mathlib/Analysis/Calculus (4084 decls) holds derivatives, Taylor series, MVT etc — the standard formal home of calculus.
Mathlib/Analysis/Calculus (4084 decls) covers derivatives, differentiability, Taylor series — the core content of differential calculus.
Mathlib/MeasureTheory/Integral (2053 decls) formalizes Lebesgue/Bochner integration and the fundamental theorem of calculus lemmas, the natural home of integral calculus.
Mathlib/FieldTheory/KummerExtension (38 decls) formalizes Kummer extensions of fields — the standard formal home of Kummer theory.
Mathlib/MeasureTheory (11556 decls) is the dedicated measure/integration-theory folder: measures, sigma-algebras, integrals.
Mathlib/Algebra (52510 decls) is the umbrella top-level folder for abstract-algebraic structures (groups, rings, fields sit as siblings GroupTheory/RingTheory/FieldTheory).
Exact-name folder Mathlib/Geometry/Euclidean (1434 decls) is the standard formal home of Euclidean geometry.
Global analysis = calculus/analysis on manifolds; Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold (3151 decls) covers smooth manifolds, tangent bundles, differential calculus there.
Mathlib/Order/BooleanAlgebra plus sibling files (BooleanSubalgebra, CompleteBooleanAlgebra, Booleanisation) in Mathlib/Order are the field's formal home.

Q177571 'decision theory' (Wikidata class Q11862829, branch of applied probability theory) is the DISCIPLINE; Mathlib/Probability/Decision/ (BayesEstimator.lean, Risk/Defs.lean, Risk/Basic.lean covering avgRisk, bayesRisk, minimaxRisk, IsBayesEstimator, IsArgminEstimator) is a dedicated folder that is exactly the field-level home for decision theory in mathlib -- a much better container than pinning the discipline to the single bayesRisk decl (which itself is being reassigned away from Q842217 in this same batch).
Mathlib/Analysis/Convex (1920 decls) holds convex sets, hulls, functions and separation theorems — the standard formal home of convex geometry.
Mathlib/Geometry/Convex (237 decls) is a smaller geometry-specific convexity folder complementing Analysis/Convex.
Mathlib/AlgebraicGeometry (schemes, sheaves, Spec, morphisms) is the dedicated top-level folder for the entire field.
Complete-lattice theory (infinite joins/meets, Galois connections) is the other core pillar of lattice theory, in its own folder.
Lattice theory = order-theoretic lattices; Mathlib/Order/Lattice is the dedicated folder (join/meet, distributive, modular lattices).
Mathlib/AlgebraicGeometry/RationalMap (77 decls) formalizes rational maps between schemes, the core object of birational geometry, though the field is broader than this one folder.
Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold (3151 decls) covers smooth manifolds, tangent bundles, Riemannian metrics, vector fields — the standard formal home of differential geometry.
Mathlib/Analysis/Normed (5600 decls) covers normed/Banach spaces and bounded operators, the core of functional analysis.
Mathlib/Analysis/Complex (1666 decls) is the dedicated folder for holomorphic functions, Cauchy integral theory, and complex-analytic structure.
Global analysis generalizes calculus/analysis to manifolds; Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold (smooth structures, MFDeriv, vector bundles, PDE-adjacent tools) is the closest tight formal home.
Mathlib/CategoryTheory (38455 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder covering the entire field of category theory.
Mathlib/Analysis/Convex (1920 decls) is the dedicated convex-analysis folder: convex sets/functions, extreme points, separation theorems.
Mathlib/Data/Matrix (919 decls) holds basic matrix definitions/operations complementing LinearAlgebra/Matrix.
Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Matrix (2465 decls) holds determinants, rank, eigenvalues, decompositions — core of matrix theory.
Mathlib/FieldTheory/Differential (26 decls) is the dedicated subfolder for differential fields/Galois theory, tighter than parent FieldTheory.
Mathlib/Order (18096 decls) is exactly the order-theory folder: posets, lattices, Galois connections, well-founded orders, etc.
Mathlib/NumberTheory/Transcendental (81 decls) contains e/pi transcendence and Lindemann-Weierstrass — exact match.
Mathlib/NumberTheory/Padics (598 decls) contains p-adic numbers, valuations, p-adic norm/completions — the field's formal home.
Mathlib/Algebra/Tropical (125 decls) implements the tropical semiring, the algebraic foundation of tropical geometry.
Mathlib/Dynamics (800 decls) is the top-level folder for dynamical systems (fixed points, flows, entropy, ergodic theory as subfolders).
Mathlib/Data/ZMod (334 decls) is Mathlib's formalization of arithmetic modulo n (ZMod type, congruences), the standard home of modular arithmetic.
Mathlib/Algebra/Lie (2012 decls) is the dedicated folder for Lie algebras, Lie modules, root systems, and related structures central to Lie theory.

Wikidata Q382520 'affine geometry': instance/subclass-of Q8087 (geometry), description 'Euclidean geometry without distance and angles' -- this is the BRANCH of geometry studying affine spaces, not the object AddTorsor/AffineSpace itself (that object-level match already exists correctly on Q382698 'Affine space'). Currently mis-graded exact/high against decl AddTorsor -- a field/object conflation matching the pattern named in this task (cf. Q3968 Algebra vs Q1000660 Algebra-over-a-field). Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/AffineSpace (~1870 decls across AffineMap.lean, AffineSubspace/, Simplex/, Combination.lean, Independent.lean etc.) is the dedicated top-level folder for the field of affine geometry -- a folder-level container is a better home than pinning to the single AddTorsor object decl.
Mathlib/Algebra (52510 decls) is the top-level algebra folder (groups, rings, modules, fields) matching the field's broad standard scope.
Mathlib/Computability/ContextFreeGrammar (68 decls) covers context-free grammars, a core topic of formal language theory.
Mathlib/Computability/Language (87 decls) formalizes formal languages (Kleene algebra of languages); sibling folders ContextFreeGrammar, RegularExpressions cover the rest of the field.
Mathlib/Computability/RegularExpressions (47 decls) covers regular expressions/regular languages, a core topic of formal language theory.
Mathlib/Topology (25904 decls) is the dedicated general-topology folder matching the field's standard scope.
Mathlib/Combinatorics/Additive formalizes additive/arithmetic combinatorics (sumsets, Freiman, Plunnecke-Ruzsa) matching the field's standard scope.
Krull dimension of rings is the other core pillar of algebraic dimension theory; Mathlib/RingTheory/KrullDimension (104 decls) formalizes it.
Exact-name folder Mathlib/Combinatorics/Extremal exists and matches the field directly.
Extremal set-family results (Kruskal-Katona, shadows, compressions) are core extremal combinatorics; SetFamily (239 decls) houses them.
Exact-name folder Mathlib/Dynamics/Ergodic (152 decls) is the standard formal home of ergodic theory.
Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Galois (224 decls) is precisely the categorical (Grothendieck) formulation of Galois theory via fiber functors on Galois categories.
Mathlib/Algebra/Homology (6140 decls) formalizes chain complexes, homology, exact sequences, derived functors — the standard formal home of homological algebra.
Mathlib/Probability (3900 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder for measures, independence, martingales, distributions, CLT etc.
Model categories (612 decls) are the standard formal toolkit of homotopical algebra; tighter than the broader AlgebraicTopology folder.
Mathlib/NumberTheory/NumberField (1360 decls) covers number fields, rings of integers, class groups — the core objects of algebraic number theory.
Mathlib/Topology (25904 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder for point-set/general topology (open sets, filters, continuity, compactness, metric spaces).
Mathlib/RingTheory (17722 decls) is overwhelmingly commutative-ring theory: ideals, localization, Noetherian/Artinian rings, valuations — the field's standard scope.

Mathlib/Analysis/Asymptotics (IsBigO, IsLittleO, IsEquivalent, Theta, SuperpolynomialDecay, ExpGrowth, etc.) is the dedicated top-level folder for asymptotic analysis as a field, a better field-level home than a single decl edge.
Mathlib/Combinatorics (7004 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder covering graphs, set families, extremal/enumerative combinatorics, matroids etc.
Mathlib/Topology/Sheaves (555 decls) holds sheaf/presheaf definitions, sheafification, stalks — the core of sheaf theory.
Categorical topology studies topological spaces via category-theoretic structure (Top, CompHaus, Profinite as categories) - matches Mathlib/Topology/Category.
Mathlib/Geometry (5456 decls) is the umbrella folder for Euclidean, manifold, convex, and group geometry; broad top-level container for the field.
Mathlib/LinearAlgebra (11652 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder for vector spaces, bases, matrices-as-maps, tensor/exterior algebra — the standard formal home of the field.
Mathlib/GroupTheory (8338 decls) is the dedicated group-theory folder (subgroups, quotients, Sylow, free groups, presentations).
Mathlib/Analysis/Fourier (402 decls) holds Fourier series/transform theory, the core of harmonic analysis as formalized in Mathlib.
Mathlib/Topology/Homotopy (407 decls) is the dedicated homotopy-theory folder: homotopic maps, fundamental groupoid/group, path homotopy, covering spaces.
Mathlib/Topology/Algebra (6901 decls) is exactly topological algebraic structures: topological groups, rings, modules, fields.
